impact: This advances the PP&D daemon guardrails by proving the diagnostic captures the blocked task, successor validation task, allowed one-file retry, prohibited broad rewrite, and explicitly defers the public crawl frontier checkpoint implementation.
summary: Add fixture-backed validation for the checkbox-122 diagnostic shape.
target_task: Task checkbox-123: Task checkbox-123: Add validation for the checkbox-122 diagnostic proving it reports the blocked task ID, the accepted successor validation task ID, the allowed one-file retry shape, and the prohibited broad rewrite shape without implementing the public crawl frontier checkpoint.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
